episodes.title: He Invented a Toy, Then Abandoned His Family for a Cult
episodes.description:
In 1943, a naval engineer knocked a spring off a shelf. Instead of falling, it walked. Four hundred units sold out in ninety minutes. Then the inventor abandoned his wife, his six children, and his fortune to join a cult in Bolivia. This is the untold story of the Slinky.

The Slinky is one of the most recognizable toys ever made. Over 300 million sold worldwide. Every physics classroom. Every children's playroom. Even military radio antennas in the field. But the real story behind the Slinky is darker than you would ever expect. It is a story of accidental genius, explosive commercial success, religious manipulation, and a woman who saved everything her husband tried to destroy.

Richard James invented the Slinky by accident. Betty James made it an American icon. This is their story.

CHAPTERS
0:00 A Spring Falls Off a Shelf
0:42 The World Before the Slinky
2:31 The Spark of Invention
4:43 The First Domino Falls
7:00 The Chain Reaction
9:28 The World After

Who invented the Slinky? Why did Richard James abandon his family? What happened to the Slinky company? How did Betty James save the Slinky? What cult did Richard James join? This documentary tells the complete untold story behind one of the most iconic toys in American history. From a naval engineering accident in Philadelphia to a cult in Bolivia to the greatest comeback in toy industry history.
